calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights By And Between D. Bryant And J.G. Wentworth Originations, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code Section 10134, Et. Seq.
Off Calendar Nov-01-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Terri Brewer, Esq. 925-267-3444 specially appearing for Defendant D. Bryant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights By And Between D. Bryant And J.G. Wentworth Originations, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code Section 10134, Et. Seq.

The tentative ruling is vacated. Off calendar. Mr. Bryant has cancelled the transfer and has submitted a request for dismissal per representation of Specially Appearing Counsel. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
